evals.prompt: Quero configurar uma wiki persistente neste projeto para manter uma base de conhecimento organizada. O projeto se chama 'meu-saas'. Configura tudo pra mim — pastas, arquivos iniciais, regras no CLAUDE.md, e espelha no Obsidian.
evals.expected_output: Creates full wiki/ and raw/ directory structure locally, initializes index.md and log.md with proper frontmatter, updates CLAUDE.md with wiki rules, and mirrors everything to Obsidian vault under meu-saas/wiki/ and meu-saas/raw/.
expectations: Creates wiki/ directory with subdirectories: sources, entities, concepts, decisions, learnings, queries
Creates raw/ directory with subdirectories: articles, docs, notes, assets
Creates wiki/index.md with YAML frontmatter including title, type, created, updated fields
Creates wiki/log.md with an init entry dated today
Updates or creates CLAUDE.md with wiki rules section
Uses mcp__obsidian__write_note to create notes in Obsidian under meu-saas/ path
Reports summary of what was created to the user

evals.prompt:
Coloquei um artigo sobre arquitetura hexagonal em raw/articles/hexagonal-architecture.md. Faz a ingestão dele na wiki. O conteúdo do artigo é:

# Hexagonal Architecture

Also known as Ports and Adapters, proposed by Alistair Cockburn in 2005.

## Core Idea
The application communicates with the outside world through ports (interfaces) and adapters (implementations). The domain logic sits at the center, completely isolated from infrastructure concerns.

## Key Benefits
- Testability: domain logic can be tested without infrastructure
- Flexibility: swap adapters without changing domain
- Clear boundaries between business rules and technical details

## Related Patterns
- Clean Architecture (Robert C. Martin)
- Onion Architecture (Jeffrey Palermo)
- Domain-Driven Design (Eric Evans)

## Technologies
Commonly implemented with Spring Boot, NestJS, or FastAPI.
evals.expected_output: Ingests the article: creates a source summary page, entity pages for technologies mentioned, concept pages for architectural patterns, updates index.md and log.md, and syncs everything to Obsidian.
expectations: Creates wiki/sources/hexagonal-architecture.md with a structured summary
Creates or updates entity pages for at least Spring Boot, NestJS, or FastAPI
Creates a concept page for hexagonal architecture with wikilinks to related concepts
Mentions related patterns like Clean Architecture or Onion Architecture with wikilinks
Updates wiki/index.md with the new pages
Appends an ingest entry to wiki/log.md
Uses mcp__obsidian__write_note to sync pages to Obsidian
Reports to user how many pages were created/updated

evals.expected_output: Shows wiki statistics: total pages by type, last operations from log, sources ingested vs pending, and Obsidian sync status.
expectations: Reads wiki/index.md to count pages by type
Reads wiki/log.md to show recent operations
Reports total counts for sources, entities, concepts, decisions, learnings, queries
Checks raw/ for pending (not yet ingested) sources
Presents information in a clear, organized format
